mapper.sql:
FROM employee e INNER JOIN department d ON d.id = e.deptment_id AND d.dept_type = '医技科室' LEFT JOIN users u ON u.employee_id = e.id WHERE 1 = 1
AND e.delmark = 0
AND e.deptment_id = #{departmentId}
AND e.realname ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.select:
SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id AS deptmentId, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.realname, e.delmark, u.id AS userId, u.username, u.status AS accountStatus
ORDER BY e.deptment_id, e.id LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id AS deptmentId, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.realname, e.delmark, u.id AS userId, u.username, u.status AS accountStatus
ORDER BY e.deptment_id, e.id

SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id AS deptmentId, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.realname, e.delmark, u.id AS userId, u.username, u.status AS accountStatus FROM employee e INNER JOIN department d ON d.id = e.deptment_id AND d.dept_type = '医技科室' LEFT JOIN users u ON u.employee_id = e.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
